title: Peer Evaluation process carried out at the Faculty of Dentistry
content:
Peer Evaluation process carried out at the Faculty of Dentistry

SDG tags related to the news

DOI

https://doi.org/10.32739/uha.id.66095

The peer evaluation process conducted within the Üsküdar University Faculty of Dentistry has been successfully completed. Within the scope of the evaluation, efforts were made to disseminate, internalize, and sustainably develop the culture of quality throughout the faculty.

Evaluation Process Carried Out at NP Health Campus

The evaluation process carried out at Üsküdar University NP Health Campus was attended by; Prof. Dr. Ergün Yücel, Dean of the Faculty of Dentistry, Assoc. Prof. Dr. Barış Karabulut, Associate Dean, Assoc. Prof. Dr. Pınar Aslan, faculty member of the Department of Public Relations and Promotion at the Faculty of Communication, and Lecturer Gönül Kil Tetik, Head of the Disabled Care and Rehabilitation Program at the Vocational School of Health Services.

Academic Evaluation Meetings Held

Assoc. Prof. Dr. Pınar Aslan, a faculty member of the Department of Public Relations and Promotion at the Faculty of Communication, chaired the peer evaluation process.

Within the scope of the process, one-on-one meetings were held with academics and students determined by the faculty.

Application Areas and Training Opportunities Evaluated

Within the program, classrooms and laboratories were visited, and the faculty's physical infrastructure, educational environments, and application areas were examined on-site.

Thanks to the conducted meetings and field visits, the current situation of the faculty was evaluated from a holistic perspective.

Outcomes for Continuous Improvement Obtained

The peer evaluation process was completed as a productive study that supports the Faculty of Dentistry's quality-oriented approach; contributing to the identification of strengths and areas for improvement.

Üsküdar News Agency (ÜHA)
